metrics.heading: Sustainability
metrics.phrase: They're doing a great job with green stuff (Clean).
metrics.label: Clean

metrics.heading: Environmental
metrics.phrase: They’re really good at making the planet greener (Green).
metrics.label: Green

metrics.heading: People & Society
metrics.phrase: Their people and society care is excellent (Excellent).
metrics.label: Excellent

metrics.heading: Corporate Governance
metrics.phrase: How they run their company is strong (Strong).
metrics.label: Strong

metrics.heading: Management Honesty
metrics.phrase: The management is very open about what’s going on (Open).
metrics.label: Open

metrics.heading: Growth Plans
metrics.phrase: They have ambitious plans for growth (Very Ambitious).
metrics.label: Very Ambitious

metrics.heading: Risk Level
metrics.phrase: There are some risks, but they're managing them well (High Risk).
metrics.label: High Risk

metrics.heading: Investor Confidence
metrics.phrase: People trust the company a lot (Very Trusted).
metrics.label: Very Trusted
